name: Weave from Promenade Position
preceding_figure_names: Back Whisk, Contra Check, Fallaway Whisk, Open Impetus, Open Telemark, Outside Change, Turning Lock, Turning Lock to R, Whisk
following_figure_names: Natural Spin Turn, Natural Turn, Wing (when ended in PP), Left Whisk (when ended in PP), Chasse From Promenade Position (when ended in PP), Closed Wing, Cross Hesitation (when ended in PP)
notes:
Man: 1/8 to L can be made between 2-3, so 4-5 may be taken BLOD.
Less turn can be made on Whisk to end facing LOD, or the Open Impetus could be used an an entry, when the body would be facing LOD. Then, the alignment will be like the Weave in Foxtrot.
This may end in PP, same as Outside change to PP from step 4.

steps.action: RF fwd and across in PP and CBMP, Pointing DC, body facing LOD, traveling DC
comments: Start to rise at end of 1
3 different points in PP: base: waist area down to feet, rotate slightly to left; belly button: low center, slightly different angle.; sternum: high center

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back, BLOD, TH
LF fwd in PP and CBMP, Facing DC, traveling DC
RF to side and slightly back, BDC, T
LF to side and slightly fwd, Pointing DC, TH
